sizing_rule.note: Do not enter trade if required position size (from optimal f) exceeds available capital. This indicates operating beyond peak of f curve where risk of ruin is unacceptable. Scale down or skip trade if Position_Size > Available_Capital.

source_rule_text: Do not commit capital to a trade if the required position size exceeds available capital, as this indicates operating beyond the peak of the f curve where risk of ruin becomes unacceptable.
